data.content: Clean implementation: deleted PROMPT.md, PROMPT_BEATS.md, PROMPT_KNOTS.md template files. Removed fallbackPromptProfileForRepoPath function from doctor.ts and its usage in checkMemoryImplementationCompatibility (now just reports 'could not enumerate workflows' without fallback profile reference). Removed CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md lines from docs/audit/beats-usage-inventory.md. All quality gates pass (lint, tsc, 2037 tests, build). Branch work/foolery-79f6 pushed. No unrelated changes bundled.
